message:
feat(conformance): expand ufunc differential corpus with 37 new arithmetic and bitwise edge cases

Add 21 arithmetic edge case fixtures: floor_divide with negative operands
(rounds toward -inf), remainder with Python-style sign semantics, power(0,0)=1,
power(-1,0.5)=NaN, float_power variants, division-by-zero (1/0=inf, 0/0=NaN),
floor_divide_by_zero, remainder_by_zero, and ldexp with negative/overflow exponent.

Add 16 bitwise AND/OR/XOR fixtures: u8/i32/i8/u16 integer dtypes, bool operations,
cross-dtype promotion (u8&i32, u8|u16), self-XOR=0, all-ones XOR=0, -1&127 via int8.

Oracle reports updated: 287->372 mismatch cases (all passing), 335->372
differential cases (all passing).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

   "failed_cases": 0,
   "mismatches": []
 }
